heading: Wednesday Night
text: Clear skies; possibly some high clouds late near the international border. Lows from the upper teens to mid 20s, except mid to upper 20s in the broad northwestern valleys, and low to mid teens northeast. Winds light, variable to south, except from the south at 5 to 15 mph in the broad western valleys.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly sunny. Blustery, with highs from the mid 50s to around 60 east of the Greens, and upper 50s to mid 60s west. South winds gusting to 30 mph, except gusting to 40 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Periods of clouds. Chance of showers in the St. Lawrence Valley. Lows in the 30s, around 30 in the cold spots east of the Greens, and lower 40s in the broad valleys west. South winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph early.
